testcase.name: testSignatureAfterContentChange
testcase.system-out:

jOOQ tip of the day: There's no easier way to nest collections directly in SQL than using MULTISET, e.g. to collect your to-many relationships: https://www.jooq.org/doc/latest/manual/sql-building/column-expressions/multiset-value-constructor/

testcase.system-err: Mockito is currently self-attaching to enable the inline-mock-maker. This will no longer work in future releases of the JDK. testcase.name: testDuplicateSignatureRejected
testcase.system-out: 2026-04-20T20:24:24.366Z INFO 85 --- [plm-core] [ main] c.p.n.t.internal.PlmTransactionService : Transaction opened: id=3badb418-cc81-4174-b6b6-ddf99fb8ee45 owner=alice 2026-04-20T20:24:24.377Z INFO 85 --- [plm-core] [ main] com.plm.node.NodeService : Node created: id=bb87eca0-aa9b-422d-9483-8b806437bed0 type=1ce925de-c828-4e12-8778-085b6d89b297 user=alice 2026-04-20T20:24:24.389Z INFO 85 --- [plm-core] [ main] c.p.n.t.internal.PlmTransactionService : Transaction committed: id=3badb418-cc81-4174-b6b6-ddf99fb8ee45 owner=alice versions=1 deferred=0 continuation=null comment='Initial creation' 2026-04-20T20:24:24.405Z INFO 85 --- [plm-core] [ main] c.p.n.s.internal.SignatureService : Signature: node=bb87eca0-aa9b-422d-9483-8b806437bed0 user=bob meaning=Reviewed version=414ba8e6-0166-4244-a2eb-e565a1643c67

testcase.name: testSignaturePreservesIteration
